offer: For medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, inefficient data handling causes delayed reimbursements. We automate claim batching instead of manual data entry and claim submission.
problem: Inefficient conversion of patient visit data into insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to clinics with demo video
Community forums for clinic tool sharing
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and batch claims on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing patient data
